vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-486: Detachable terminal — popout workspace terminal into OS window

plan.title: Detachable terminal — popout workspace terminal into OS window
plan.author: agent:minimax-m2.7-highspeed

narratives.Problem: The terminal is the primary interaction surface for Panopticon agents. Users cannot easily monitor a running agent while working in another workspace, give the terminal more screen real estate, or switch to it via Alt+Tab without the full dashboard in the taskbar.
narratives.Proposal: Add a popout button to the terminal panel header that opens the terminal in a dedicated OS-managed window. In browser mode, use window.open() with a named popup. In Electron, create a native BrowserWindow with IPC for title and always-on-top control. The underlying tmux session is shared — no new PTY is spawned.

items.title: Add detach button to TerminalPanel header

narrative.Action: Add an ExternalLink (popout) icon button to the TerminalPanel header, to the right of the close button. Wire it to a popoutTerminal(agent.id, title) function.

subItems.title: Detach button visible in terminal panel header

items.title: Implement popoutTerminal() helper with browser/electron runtime detection

narrative.Action: Implement popoutTerminal(sessionName, title) in TerminalPanel.tsx. Detects window.panopticonBridge for Electron, falls back to window.open() for browser. Uses window name terminal-{sessionName} to prevent duplicate popouts.

subItems.title: Re-clicking detach re-focuses existing popup (no duplicates)

narrative.Action: Create StandaloneTerminal.tsx with: (1) header showing title + always-on-top toggle, (2) XTerminal component for the tmux session. Add /terminal/:sessionName path to App.tsx routing that renders this component with no sidebar/header.

subItems.title: Popped-out terminal connects to the same tmux session (no new session spawned)
Window title reflects agent ID + issue ID (e.g. agent-PAN-486 · PAN-486)

narrative.Action: Add OPEN_TERMINAL_WINDOW IPC channel and openTerminalWindow(sessionName, title) method to preload.ts PanopticonBridge type and implementation.

items.title: Add Electron BrowserWindow creation for terminal popout

narrative.Action: Add IPC.OPEN_TERMINAL_WINDOW handler in main.ts that creates a frameless BrowserWindow loading /terminal/{sessionName}. Add SET_ALWAYS_ON_TOP IPC to control window.setAlwaysOnTop(). Track terminal windows in a Map by sessionName for re-focus on subsequent calls.

subItems.title: Closing popup does not kill the tmux session

items.title: Add always-on-top toggle to standalone terminal header

narrative.Action: Add Pin/PinOff toggle button in StandaloneTerminal header. In Electron, sends SET_ALWAYS_ON_TOP IPC. In browser popup, calls popupWindow.focus() as fallback (browser cannot control always-on-top).
